movie.actors: Robin Shou, Talisa Soto, James Remar, Sandra Hess
movie.plot: A group of martial arts warriors have only six days to save the Earth from an extra-dimensional invasion.
movie.title: Mortal Kombat: Annihilation
movie.writer: Ed Boon (video games), Lawrence Kasanoff (story), Joshua Wexler (story), John Tobias (story), Brent V. Friedman (screenplay), Bryce Zabel (screenplay)
